description: This architecture represents an LLM-as-a-Controller paradigm where a central orchestration layer coordinates between deep static analysis and agentic reasoning. The system follows a pipeline where the Environment & Project Discovery layer prepares the workspace, the Static Analysis & Graph Engine extracts structural semantics, and the Agentic Reasoning & Abstraction layer transforms raw data into architectural insights. These insights are then validated by the Quality & Telemetry layer before being persisted and rendered by the Persistence & Documentation layer, ensuring a high-fidelity, incremental documentation workflow.

components.name: Orchestration & CLI Controller
components.description: Acts as the system entry point, managing the execution lifecycle, CLI command parsing, and the high-level coordination of the analysis pipeline.

components.name: CLI Entry & Command Dispatcher
components.description: Acts as the primary interface between the user and the application, parsing command-line arguments and mapping them to execution strategies.

components.name: CLI Bootstrap & Environment Validator
components.description: Acts as the pre-flight controller, initializing the application environment and ensuring all external dependencies are present.

components.name: Workflow Execution Engine
components.description: Orchestrates high-level agentic or analytical processes based on validated commands.

components.description: Handles terminal presentation and real-time progress updates for long-running tasks.

components.name: Project Structure Scanner
components.description: Performs deep inspection of the target repository to identify programming languages, configuration files, and dependency structures while managing ignore-logic and repository hashing.

components.name: Repository Traversal & Filtering
components.description: Manages the physical inspection of the file system, implements ignore logic, and generates repository state hashes for incremental analysis.

components.name: Traversal Orchestrator & Tech Identifier
components.description: The central engine for physical repository inspection. It walks the file system to identify programming languages, maps file extensions to profiles, and categorizes the repository's technical stack using tools like Tokei.

components.name: Exclusion & Filter Manager
components.description: Acts as the gatekeeper for all traversal operations. It aggregates exclusion rules from .gitignore, .codeboardingignore, and internal defaults to provide a unified filtering API that prevents noise and sensitive data from entering the analysis pipeline.

components.name: Ecosystem & Dependency Discovery
components.description: Specifically targets "brain files" (manifests like package.json or pyproject.toml) to map the project's dependency graph and ecosystem boundaries.

components.name: Incremental State Tracker
components.description: Manages repository "snapshots" by hashing file contents and directory structures. It enables incremental analysis by identifying exactly which components have changed since the last successful scan.

components.name: LSP Workspace Mapper
components.description: Translates the physical file structure into logical Language Server Protocol (LSP) workspaces. It identifies root directories for different languages and configures the environment for deep static analysis.

components.name: Project Environment Discovery
components.description: Performs deep inspection of files to determine project boundaries, workspace structures, and environment-specific settings for static analysis.

components.name: TypeScript & Web Scanner

components.description: The central singleton controller that manages the lifecycle of the telemetry client, handling initialization and flushing events.

components.name: Identity Resolver
components.description: Generates and maintains persistent unique identifiers for installations, bridging anonymous hardware IDs and authenticated user overrides.

components.name: Event Dispatcher
components.description: The primary API for recording activities and failures, enriching events with system context and routing them to the orchestrator.

components.name: Telemetry Schema Registry
components.description: Defines structured data contracts and event taxonomies to ensure type-safe telemetry data.

components.name: Analysis Event Tracker
components.description: Translates static analysis outcomes into telemetry events, capturing performance metrics and domain-specific data.

components.name: Analysis Performance Monitor
components.description: Orchestrates the collection of high-level execution metrics for analysis runs, capturing duration, success states, and project scale.

components.name: Tech Stack & Domain Mapper
components.description: Translates discovered environment data like languages and frameworks into domain-specific telemetry to provide context on the codebase.

components.name: LSP Intelligence Tracker
components.description: A specialized transformer for Language Server Protocol data, tracking symbol density, reference resolution success, and communication health.

components.name: Persistence & Documentation
components.description: Manages the storage of analysis results, handles incremental updates via Git diffs, and renders final outputs into Markdown or Mermaid.js diagrams.

components.name: Incremental Change Tracker
components.description: Interfaces with the host Git repository to identify modified files and specific line ranges, enabling targeted, incremental analysis.

components.name: Git Repository Interface
components.description: Acts as the low-level adapter for the Git binary, handling command execution, repository state verification, and the retrieval of raw file lists and diff streams.

components.name: Git Command Executor
components.description: The low-level adapter responsible for constructing and executing Git subprocesses, ensuring deterministic output and consistent environment handling.

components.name: Repository Context Manager
components.description: Validates the operational environment, resolves symbolic references, and identifies commit anchors for analysis.

components.name: Incremental Change Detector
components.description: Identifies deltas between repository states, filtering modified, staged, and untracked files to drive incremental analysis.

components.name: Git Data Extractor
components.description: Retrieves content and patches from the Git database, generating raw diff streams and reading file blobs at historical snapshots.

components_relations.relation: passes arguments to retrieve file status
utilizes executor for diff streams and cat-file operations

components.name: Diff & Patch Processor
components.description: Orchestrates the transformation of raw text diffs into structured objects by parsing unified diff formats and extracting granular hunks of code changes.

components.name: Change Orchestrator
components.description: Acts as the subsystem's facade and controller, managing the lifecycle of change detection operations and aggregating the final structured ChangeSet.

components.name: Patch Segmenter
components.description: A pre-processing engine that cleans and divides monolithic diff output, applying logic to ignore non-source files and splitting the stream into individual file-level patches.

components.name: Hunk Parser
components.description: A low-level parsing engine that interprets Unified Diff format text, transforming raw lines into structured DiffHunk objects.

components.name: Change Impact Modeler
components.description: Provides the semantic domain model for changes by mapping line-level diffs to specific code ranges and classifying the status of methods or classes.

components.name: Change Range Extractor
components.description: Responsible for parsing raw diff outputs and calculating the precise line ranges that have been added, modified, or deleted.

components.name: Semantic Impact Classifier
components.description: Maps physical line changes to the project's logical structure by intersecting changed ranges with symbol definitions to classify method and class statuses.

components.name: Change Detection Orchestrator
components.description: Manages the end-to-end lifecycle of change analysis across a repository, coordinating extraction and classification to produce a unified impact model.

components.name: Analysis Cache Manager
components.description: Manages the persistence of analysis results using SHA-based keys and model signatures to ensure cache integrity and portability.

components.name: Portability & Path Normalization Engine
components.description: Handles the transformation of file paths between absolute and relative formats to ensure cache portability across different environments.

components.name: Path Translation Core
components.description: Handles the bidirectional conversion between absolute system paths and project-relative paths, managing OS-specific separators and root-directory anchoring to ensure cache portability.

components.name: Analysis Result Normalizer
components.description: Performs deep, recursive traversal of analysis data structures to normalize embedded file references, ensuring the content of analysis results is portable before persistence.

components.name: Integrity & Retrieval Controller
components.description: Orchestrates the lookup of cached analysis data by validating source code SHAs and AI model signatures.

components.name: Cache Access Orchestrator
components.description: Manages the high-level lifecycle of a cache request, acting as the primary entry point for the AbstractionAgent and coordinating between integrity checks and data retrieval.

components.name: Integrity Validator
components.description: The core logic engine that performs verification by comparing current file SHAs and model signatures against historical cache metadata.

components.name: Cache Storage & Metadata Mapper
components.description: Handles the translation of logical code entities into physical filesystem paths and manages the persistence of metadata tags and cache keys.

components.name: Path Normalization & Serialization
components.description: Ensures cache portability by converting absolute system paths to repository-relative paths during serialization and restoring them during loading.
